cards.name: Apologize
cards.effect: Take a tantrum you've thrown and send it to the discard pile.

cards.name: Automation
cards.effect: Gain +2 actions this turn.
cards.flavor: Can't stop progress. May as well embrace it!

cards.name: Blame Changer
cards.effect: Give another player one of your played tantrums.

cards.name: Connections
cards.effect: Take a Black Market card from the market and play it for free.

cards.name: Doorbuster Sale
cards.effect: Choose a Stand to immediately make a sale.
cards.flavor: Let's create a sense of urgency.

cards.name: Finders Keepers
cards.effect: Steal a Black Market card from another player and play it immediately.
cards.flavor: Wow, someone left this here just for me!

cards.name: HOA Violation
cards.effect: Take $5 from another player.
cards.flavor: Umm...are those lemons sunshine yellow or golden citrus?

cards.name: I'm Rubber, You're Glue
cards.effect: Place the attack on the attacker instead, as if you played it.
cards.condition: Play after an attack is played

cards.name: Market Forecasting
cards.effect: Draw 3 cards from the Lemon deck.

cards.name: Night Shifts
cards.effect: Immediately make a sale roll. This roll only applies to you.
cards.flavor: Howdy, stranger! Would ya like to buy some lemonade?

cards.name: Out of Stock
cards.effect: Re-roll the die that was just rolled.
cards.flavor: When life takes your lemons, no sales for you!
cards.condition: Play after any player rolls a die

cards.name: Profit Share
cards.effect: If money was stolen, split the money with the attacker (rounding your half up).
cards.condition: Play after an attack is resolved

cards.name: Rebrand
cards.effect: Swap one of your Stands with any other Stand type. Discard Black Market cards if necessary.

cards.name: Reduce and Reuse
cards.effect: Take a discarded Black Market card and play it immediately.

cards.name: Reverse Engineer
cards.effect: Take a discarded Lemon card and play it immediately, or draw 2 cards from the Lemon deck.

cards.name: Rummage Sale
cards.effect: Sell up to 3 of your Black Market cards for 1/2 their base price (rounding each card up).

cards.name: Sharing Is Caring
cards.effect: Choose a player. Steal half of their money (rounding up, max $10).

cards.name: Smear Campaign
cards.effect: Steal 2 random Lemon cards from another player's hand. Then you may play any card.
cards.flavor: Let's just say, it's not made with lemons...

cards.name: Steal the Cashbox
cards.effect: Play on a Turf before rolling. Steal up to $10 in earnings. Discard after rolling.

cards.name: Tag, You're It!
cards.effect: You may move the attack to another player (not the attacker). In a 2-player game, discard it instead.
cards.condition: Play after an attack is played

cards.name: Tantrum
cards.effect: Cancel the card and discard it. The player gets their money (but not action) back.
cards.flavor: Place below your Turf after playing.
cards.condition: Play after someone plays a Lemon card or buys a Black Market card

cards.name: Taxes
cards.effect: Choose a player. Steal $2 per Stand they have (max $10).
cards.flavor: Uncle Sam always gets his due!

cards.name: That's Not Fair!
cards.effect: Choose an equipped Black Market card and discard it.
cards.flavor: Involving parents helps level the playing field.

cards.name: Trash Pandas
cards.effect: Trade hands with another player.
cards.flavor: One kid's trash is another kid's treasure!

cards.name: Timeout
cards.effect: Stop play and immediately do the following: All players discard down to 10 Lemon cards. The Whiniest Baby must pay $3 for each played tantrum (sell cards if needed) then discard all their tantrums and this card. Pass the Whiniest Baby card, draw a new card, then continue.
